zh.lifeSummary: 當Gödeke Henriksson Fincke於大約1383年出生在芬蘭圖爾庫 亞 波里馬斯庫時，他的父親Henrik Fincke35歲，母親Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke15歲。他和Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast至少有1個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1467年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gödeke Henriksson Fincke于大约1383年出生在芬兰圖爾庫 亞 波里馬斯庫时，他的父亲Henrik Fincke35岁，母亲Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke15岁。他和Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast至少有1个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1467年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Fincke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fink
meanings: German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and English: nickname for a lively and cheerful person, or, in the case of the Jewish name, an artificial name, from Middle High German vinke, Middle English and Yiddish fink ‘finch’ (see Finch and Vink ). The surname of German origin is also found in some central European countries, for example in Czechia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. In part, this is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ).

nameMeanings.name: Gödeke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Goecke
meanings: North German (Göcke): Low German form of Goedeke .

variants.name: Goeke
meanings: German (also Göke): from a shortened form of Goedeke .

variants.name: Goedecke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Elfriede, Erwin, Heinrich, Klaus, Manfred, Otto.
North German (also Gödecke): from a pet form of the personal name Godefried, Low German form of Gottfried .

variants.name: Goedken
meanings: Shortened form of German Goedeken, a patronymic from Goedeke .

nameMeanings.name: Henriksson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Lars, Sig, Thor.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Henriksson: patronymic from the personal name Henrik (see Henry 1). This is also an Americanized form of the Norwegian and Danish cognate Henriksen . Compare Hendrickson and Henrickson .

variants.name: Hendrickson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ), Danish, Norwegian, and North German Henriksen or Henrichsen , and Dutch, North German, and Danish Hendriksen . Compare Hendrixson and Henrickson .

English (eastern): patronymic from the personal name Hendrick + -son. This form of the surname appears to be a 16th- or 17th-century importation to Britain from the Netherlands, and was reinforced in the 20th century.

variants.name: Henrickson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish patronymic Henriksson (see Henrikson ) or of its Danish, Norwegian, and North German cognates (see Henricksen ). Compare Hendrickson .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Gödeke Henriksson Fincke was born about 1383, in Masku, Turku ja Pori, Finland, his father, Henrik Fincke, was 35 and his mother, Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke, was 15. He had at least 1 son and 6 daughters with Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast. He died before 1467.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gödeke Henriksson Fincke est né environ 1383, à Masku, Turku ja Pori, Finlande, son père, Henrik Fincke, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles avec Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast. Il est décédé avant 1467.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gödeke Henriksson Fincke um 1383 in Masku, Turku ja Pori, Finnland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henrik Fincke 35 und seine Mutter Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke 15. Er hatte mit Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor 1467.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gödeke Henriksson Fincke è nato il circa 1383 nel Masku, Turku ja Pori, Finlandia, il suo padre, Henrik Fincke, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie con Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast. Morì prima del 1467.

ja.lifeSummary: Gödeke Henriksson Finckeが約1383年にフィンランドトゥルク ジャ ポリマスクで生まれた時，父Henrik Finckeは35歳，母Metta Gödekesdotter Finckeは15歳であった。彼はKatarina Nilsdotter Tawastとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1467年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gödeke Henriksson Fincke(이)가 대략 1383년 핀란드 터르쿠 자 포리 마스쿠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henrik Fincke(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gödeke Henriksson Fincke nasceu aproximadamente 1383, em Masku, Turku ja Pori, Finlândia, seu pai, Henrik Fincke, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas com Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast. Ele faleceu antes 1467.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gödeke Henriksson Fincke родился около 1383 г. в местности маску, турку джа пори, Финляндия, его отцу по имени Henrik Fincke было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke, 15. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей от Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast. Он умер перед 1467 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gödeke Henriksson Fincke nació aproximadamente 1383, en Masku, Turku ja Pori, Finlandia, su papá, Henrik Fincke, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Metta Gödekesdotter Fincke, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas con Katarina Nilsdotter Tawast. Murió antes de 1467.
